strategy: Every time she takes damage she heals 420 (Leprechaun), so avoid chipping her with many small hits.
Stack blades and Feint, then land one large hit; the single 420 heal is trivial against a big burst.
Multi-hit spells like Minotaur only trigger the heal once, so they are fine.
Bring enough setup to one-shot or near-one-shot her 12,205 health.
cheatNotes: Any damage she takes heals her 420. Burst her with one big hit rather than many small ones.
Multi-hit spells only trigger the 420 heal a single time, so they are safe to use.
